description_long: This is a pair of heavy-duty pliers with a robust, rusted metal head and two thick, red handles. The handles are ergonomically curved and one is partially wrapped with blue tape, likely for added grip or repair. The metal jaws are broad and flat, with a squared-off profile, showing signs of significant wear and oxidation. The tool appears well-used, with visible rust and darkening on the metal surfaces, especially around the joint and jaws. The handles are made of a hard plastic or rubberized material, providing insulation and comfort during use. This tool is typical of those found in urban garages, workshops, or maintenance settings.
description: A well-used, rusted pair of pliers with red handles, one wrapped in blue tape, and broad, flat jaws. The tool shows significant wear and is suited for heavy-duty gripping or cutting tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pliers, highlighting the red handles and blue tape on one grip.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the broad, flat jaws and the open handles, with the blue tape visible on the left.
description_view_2: Angled side view emphasizing the curvature of the handles and the rusted metal head.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open handles, blue tape on the right, and the squared-off jaw ends.
attribute_rust_or_wear_marks: Significant rust and wear marks on the metal jaws and pivot joint, with dark discoloration and surface corrosion.
